examples:
Command Example
bluecat-am-get-response-policies start="0" count="30"
Context Example
{
"BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies": [
{
"RedirectTarget": "foo.com",
"ResponsePolicyType": "REDIRECT",
name: bluecat-am-get-response-policies

outputs.description: ID of the response policy. BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.Name Name of the response policy.
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.ID

outputs.description: Time to live (TTL) of the response policy. BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.Type Type of the response policy (BLACKLIST, BLACKHOLE, WHITELIST, or REDIRECT).
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.Ttl

outputs.description: Target of redirect, in case of REDIRECT policy type.
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.RedirectTarget
